## [00:00 - 00:38]

Telegrams. You don't even know what a telegram is, do you? Look, I'm going retro, but I'm bringing back the 30s to the 21st century. And don't laugh at me before you discount this like everybody else has around me. Hundreds of millions of people use telegrams every day. Just go search out telegrams for about $7.50. You can have a handwritten or type written, it looks like type, customized telegram sent to your client. They've never gotten one. From anybody, maybe in their lifetime. The only time they saw it was when they were doing black and white movies of World War II. Try to telegram for follow up. Let me know how it works for you.
